name: scene_sync_redeem
description: Stable Scene Sync tool: redeem a 6-digit pairing code and create an AI session.

code.description: 6-digit pairing code shown in Scene Sync.

name: scene_sync_get_scene
description: Stable Scene Sync tool: read the current scene snapshot for the linked room. Use before and after mutations when verification matters.

name: scene_sync_broadcast
description: Stable Scene Sync tool: apply a scene mutation such as scene-add, scene-delta, scene-remove, scene-env, or scene-batch.

payload.description: Scene mutation payload. Required: payload.kind. For primitive scene-add, include payload.asset.type, payload.asset.primitive, and payload.asset.color. Use scene-delta for partial updates and scene-remove for deletes.

name: scene_sync_ai_command
description: Stable Scene Sync tool: run a browser-only command such as getCameraPose, focusObject, screenshot, undo, redo, getHistory, or uploadGlbFromUrl.

params.description: For focusObject send params.objectId. For uploadGlbFromUrl send params.url. After uploadGlbFromUrl, read the scene snapshot if deduplication or placement verification matters.

name: scene_sync_revoke
description: Stable Scene Sync tool: revoke the current AI session.
